title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; non-blocking and reactive options.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama + Chroma for local docs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration enabling Ollama models as generators and embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat pane.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, featuring syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama; macOS/Windows/Linux builds available.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes an OpenAI-compatible REST API on top of Ollama for easier front-end adoption.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot starter auto-configuring an Ollama Java client for rapid enterprise integration.

title: ollama-ng
summary: Experimental next-gen Ollama manager with UI for model versioning, GPU sharding and multi-node clusters.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ and Unity.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust client for Ollama with tokio and serde; includes CLI example.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app providing Ollama model management, chat interface and REST endpoints.
